title: UI and UX Design Review Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Wireframe" in UI and UX Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A low-detail layout plan for an interface
wrongAnswers: A system response that confirms an action or state
A design state that communicates a problem
The visible and interactive parts of a product

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Prototype" in UI and UX Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An interactive or visual model used to test a design
wrongAnswers: Designing products for people with varied abilities
A design state shown when there is no content yet
The overall experience a person has using a product

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Usability testing" in UI and UX Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Observing users to find design problems
wrongAnswers: A visual difference that helps elements stand apart
Helping new users begin using a product
A research-based profile representing a user type

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Information architecture" in UI and UX Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Organizing content so people can find and understand it
wrongAnswers: Arranging elements to show importance
Short interface text that guides users
The steps a user takes to reach a goal

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Navigation" in UI and UX Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Controls that help users move through a product
wrongAnswers: Using familiar patterns across an interface
A shared set of reusable design rules and components
A low-detail layout plan for an interface

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A cue that suggests how something can be used
wrongAnswers: A design state that communicates a problem
The visible and interactive parts of a product
An interactive or visual model used to test a design
